events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: rotor mic reading (est. 22.6 mm) is below the OEM minimum discard thickness (~24.0 mm) — a safety-critical, non-compliant condition. Decision is `fail`, risk `high`, since a sub-minimum rotor risks cracking, warping, and reduced braking performance and cannot be signed off at this rough-complete stage; corrective action is rotor replacement (as an axle pair) before final acceptance.
